title: FAQ 9 - What Happens if You Ignore CRA Payroll Debt
full_text: What happens if I ignore CRA payroll debt? No jail time. No cops at your door. No, they're not going to blow you up. No, they're not going to kidnap your kids. They say they will, but they're not going to. No, they're not going to kill your dog. They say they will, but they're not going to. No, they're not showing up with tow trucks to take everything from you. It just doesn't happen. What they will do is put you in a position where they take the entire payroll debt and put it onto you. They call it being at arm's length. It's actually illegal, but they do it. So they'll take the entire payroll debt and tell you, the individual person, that you have to pay it. Sell me the corporation, however, and CRA can chase me. I make the phone call. How you doing? Kevin J. Johnson here. First thing they say, I can't talk to you because Bob Hamilton doesn't like you. Okay, but you said you want me to give you a couple million bucks. I'm here to call. Let's talk about a couple of million bucks. I mean, you're not going to get it, but let's talk about it. And they won't even negotiate with me at all to pass the introduction. So how in the hell are they going to threaten me with anything when they're too afraid to speak to me on the phone or even answer my letters? You know what they've told me? They've told me on the phone that they will not reply to my letters anymore and that they will not acknowledge me in any way. I think, okay, that works to my advantage because I've been sending them letters almost every day now and they're not reading and I've got proof. We've got the the backslips. The CRA will not use email because hackers kept hacking them. Good. So anonymous if you guys are out there keep it up I love you guys Keep it up Keep hacking the CRA Sorry I can say that Please consider hacking the CRA There you go They're as awful as they come. That's why the CRA uses faxes and not email. All righty. So how long before they escalate collections? Depends on the agent, right? A lot of the agents will have a little bit of autonomy to make decisions. I find that women wait a bit longer because when you yell at women who work for the CRA, they tend to get upset a bit more. A couple of men out there have tried to be tough and whatnot. And you saw what I would send them. I'd send them faxes of, you know, schlongs and whatnot with their faces on it and telling them like, yeah, you're my little bitch. Come on. Come on, little bitch. Do something. Do something. And they don't do anything. So I don't know, it could be a couple of months, could be a full year, could be two years. You just never know with the CRA. It's completely random and they like it that way. It's confusing to all of you and it keeps all of you on your toes. Solution, sell me your corporation. Solution, don't ever do your own payroll. Let me do your payroll for you. Now you'll never have problems again. So can they revoke my ability to operate? For example, cancel the HST or GST number, freeze my payroll accounts. No, they wouldn't do that because now you wouldn't be able to collect more GST for them. If they freeze your GST number, they can't collect from you. And if they were to freeze your payroll account, well, how do they keep adding more money to your payroll account? Right? No, they want to keep building it and building it and building it. No, they don't do that. They also don't sue you just for the record, everyone.
